title: Tool
description: Schema for developer tools, frameworks, and libraries. The `type` field must be exactly `tool` so the validator loads this schema.

type.description: Concept type — must match the schema file name in _schema/

vendor.description: Company, organization, or community that maintains the tool

license.description: Software license governing use and distribution

language.description: Primary implementation language or 'Multi-language' if broadly polyglot

url.description: Official project homepage or repository URL
